Dragon Ascent.effect: Lowers user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

Precipice Blades.effect: Hits all adjacent opponents. No stat changes.

Leaf Storm.effect: Harshly lowers user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

High Jump Kick.effect: If it misses, the user takes crash damage equal to 50% of their max HP.

Hammer Arm.effect: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.

Flare Blitz.effect: User takes 33% recoil damage. Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

Dragon Dance.effect: Raises user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage.

Swords Dance.effect: Sharply raises user's Attack by 2 stages.

Superpower.effect: Lowers user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

Overheat.effect: Harshly lowers user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

Ancient Power.effect: 10% chance to raise all of the user's stats by 1 stage.

Knock Off.effect: Inflicts 50% more damage if the target is holding an item and removes it.
